add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp-to-first.title: Add Semi-Transparent Logo Stamp to First PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp-to-first.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent image stamp (logo) on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-to-page-two.title: Add Image Stamp to Page Two
add-image-stamp-to-page-two.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with 100 % quality and 0.8 opacity, and apply it to the second page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-with-alt-text-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Image Stamp with Alt Text to PDF Page
add-image-stamp-with-alt-text-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on the third page of a PDF and set alternative text for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-background-floatingbox-page-4.title: Add Image Background to FloatingBox on Page 4
add-image-background-floatingbox-page-4.description: Loads a PDF, creates an Image from a PNG file, sets it as the background of a FloatingBox, and inserts that FloatingBox onto the fourth page of the document.

apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create an ImageStamp, and apply it to every page using a foreach loop before saving the document.

rotate-image-stamp-45-degrees.title: Rotate Image Stamp 45° and Add to PDF
rotate-image-stamp-45-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create an image stamp, rotate it by 45 degrees, position it, and add it to a page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-top-right-corner.title: Add Image Stamp to Top‑Right Corner of PDF
add-image-stamp-top-right-corner.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp (e.g., a logo) at the top‑right corner of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with configurable margins and optional opacity.

scale-image-stamp-to-full-page-width.title: Scale Image Stamp to Full Page Width
scale-image-stamp-to-full-page-width.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to every page of a PDF and scale it to the page width while preserving the original aspect ratio.

add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream to PDF
add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates how to load an image into a MemoryStream and use Aspose.Pdf to stamp that image onto every page of a PDF document.

add-low-quality-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Low-Quality Image Stamp to PDF
add-low-quality-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with reduced quality (10 %) and optional visual settings, apply it to every page, and save the modified document.

add-fully-opaque-image-watermark.title: Add Fully Opaque Image Watermark to PDF
add-fully-opaque-image-watermark.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with full opacity, center it, and apply it to every page as a visual watermark.

add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp rotated 90 degrees as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-upside-down-image-stamp.title: Add Upside-Down Image Stamp to PDF
add-upside-down-image-stamp.description: Shows how to place an image stamp rotated 180 degrees on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

place-image-stamp-at-custom-coordinates.title: Place Image Stamp at Custom Coordinates in PDF
place-image-stamp-at-custom-coordinates.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to a PDF page at specific X and Y coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-image-stamp-percentage-offsets.title: Apply Image Stamp with Percentage Offsets to PDF Pages
apply-image-stamp-percentage-offsets.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on each PDF page using offsets expressed as percentages of the page width and height.

fit-image-stamp-rectangle.title: Fit Image Stamp Within a Defined Rectangle
fit-image-stamp-rectangle.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, and automatically scaling and positioning it to fit inside a specified rectangle on a page.

add-fixed-size-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Fixed-Size Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-fixed-size-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place an image stamp with a fixed width and height on every page of a PDF, independent of page dimensions, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-with-unicode-alt-text.title: Add Image Stamp with Unicode Alternative Text to PDF
add-image-stamp-with-unicode-alt-text.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set a Unicode alternative text for multilingual accessibility, and apply the stamp to all pages.

add-image-stamp-alt-text-pdfa1b.title: Add Image Stamp with Alternative Text for PDF/A‑1b Output
add-image-stamp-alt-text-pdfa1b.description: Shows how to place an image stamp with alternative (accessibility) text on each page of a PDF and then convert the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Encrypted PDF
add-image-stamp-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, applying an image stamp with custom appearance, and saving the document while preserving its encryption.

add-image-stamp-to-signed-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Signed PDF without Invalidating Signature
add-image-stamp-to-signed-pdf.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on an already digitally signed PDF while preserving the existing signature using Aspose.Pdf incremental save.

add-image-stamp-preserve-annotations.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Annotations
add-image-stamp-preserve-annotations.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, positioning it on the first page, and saving the document while keeping any existing annotations intact.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-with-form-fields.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF with Form Fields
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-with-form-fields.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to each page of a PDF that contains interactive form fields while keeping the fields functional.

add-image-stamp-flatten-annotations.title: Add Image Stamp and Flatten Annotations to Create Read‑Only PDF
add-image-stamp-flatten-annotations.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on a PDF page and then flatten all annotations, resulting in a read‑only PDF document.

add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Bookmarks and Outline
add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping existing bookmarks and the document outline intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Page Labels
add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply the same image stamp to every page, and save the document while keeping existing page labels unchanged.

add-image-stamp-preserve-xmp-metadata.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving XMP Metadata
add-image-stamp-preserve-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on each page of a PDF and keep the original XMP metadata intact using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded-files.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Embedded Files
add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded-files.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, add a semi‑transparent image stamp to each page, and save the document while keeping any embedded files intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-javascript.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving JavaScript Actions
add-image-stamp-preserve-javascript.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping any existing JavaScript actions intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform-fields.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving AcroForm Fields
add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating its pages, applying an image stamp with alignment and opacity, and saving the document while keeping existing AcroForm fields intact.

add-custom-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Text Stamp to PDF
add-custom-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp with a custom font, size, and blue color on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-stamp-auto-adjust-font-size.title: Add Text Stamp with Auto‑Adjusting Font Size
add-text-stamp-auto-adjust-font-size.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp on a PDF page and enable automatic font size adjustment so the text fits within a defined rectangle using Aspose.Pdf.

add-outlined-text-stamp.title: Add Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-outlined-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextStamp, configuring its font, size, color and drawing mode, positioning it on a page, and saving the document. The example notes that true stroke rendering is not available and uses a bold font as an approximation.

add-bold-outlined-text-stamp.title: Add Bold Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-bold-outlined-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp with fill‑stroke rendering on each page of a PDF, creating bold outlined text using Aspose.Pdf.

align-text-stamp-bottom-left-margin.title: Align Text Stamp to Bottom-Left Corner with Margin
align-text-stamp-bottom-left-margin.description: Loads a PDF, creates a TextStamp, aligns it to the bottom‑left corner with a 10‑point margin, and applies the stamp to every page before saving.

add-slanted-text-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Slanted Text Watermark to PDF
add-slanted-text-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a text stamp, rotate it 30 degrees, and apply it as a semi‑transparent watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent 'CONFIDENTIAL' text stamp to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-stamp-with-background-box.title: Add Text Stamp with Background Box to PDF Pages
add-text-stamp-with-background-box.description: Demonstrates how to add a centered text stamp with a colored background box and optional opacity to every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multi-line-text-stamp-custom-line-sp.title: Add Multi-Line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
add-multi-line-text-stamp-custom-line-sp.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi-line text stamp to each page of a PDF and adjust the line spacing using the TextState of a TextStamp.

add-rtl-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add RTL Text Stamp to PDF Document
add-rtl-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to place a right‑to‑left Arabic text stamp on every page of a PDF and set the document language for proper RTL rendering using Aspose.Pdf.

add-full-page-image-watermark.title: Add Full-Page Image Watermark to PDF
add-full-page-image-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to overlay an image stamp as a semi‑transparent background watermark that covers the entire size of each page in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-stamp-watermark.title: Add Diagonal Text Stamp Watermark to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-text-stamp-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent diagonal "CONFIDENTIAL" text stamp to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-as-background-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Image Stamp as Background to PDF Pages
add-image-stamp-as-background-to-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp, set its Background property to true, and apply it to each page as a background watermark.

add-faint-text-overlay-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Faint Text Overlay Stamp to PDF Pages
add-faint-text-overlay-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to apply a semi‑transparent text stamp as a faint overlay on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add 90° Rotated Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, rotating it 90 degrees, setting alignment and opacity, applying it to every page, and saving the result.

add-custom-sized-page-stamp.title: Add Custom-Sized Page Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-custom-sized-page-stamp.description: Shows how to create a page stamp from an existing PDF page, set custom width, height and position, and apply it to a chosen page in the document.

add-text-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-text-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to create a TextStamp and apply it to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-page-stamp-from-pdf.title: Create Page Stamp from PDF Page
create-page-stamp-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract a page from a template PDF, create a PdfPageStamp, and apply it as a background stamp to every page of another PDF document.

apply-pdf-page-background-stamp.title: Apply PDF Page as Background Stamp to All Pages
apply-pdf-page-background-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to use a page from another PDF as a background stamp and apply it to every page of a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
add-page-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a page stamp from a source page to a range of pages (pages 5 through 10) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
